address.description: The address of the database instance.

allocated_storage.description: The amount of storage allocated for the database instance.

auto_minor_version_upgrade.description: Indicates whether minor engine upgrades are applied automatically to the database instance during the maintenance window.

availability_zone.description: The availability zone where the database instance is located.

backup_retention_period.description: The number of days to retain backups for the database instance.

ca_cert_identifier.description: The identifier of the CA certificate for the database instance.

db_cluster_identifier.description: The identifier of the DB cluster associated with the instance, if any.

db_instance_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the database instance.

db_instance_class.description: The compute and memory capacity of the database instance.

db_instance_identifier.description: The identifier for the database instance.

db_instance_port.description: The port number on which the database instance accepts connections.

db_name.description: The name of the initial database of this instance, if specified.

db_parameter_groups.description: A list of DB parameter groups associated with the instance.

db_subnet_group.description: The DB subnet group for the database instance.

enabled_cloudwatch_logs_exports.description: A list of log types that are enabled for export to CloudWatch logs.

endpoint.description: The connection endpoint for the database instance.

engine.description: The database engine used by the instance.

engine_version.description: The version of the database engine.

hosted_zone_id.description: The ID of the hosted zone for the database instance's endpoint.

id.description: The unique identifier for the database instance.

iops.description: The provisioned IOPS for the database instance, if applicable.

kms_key_id.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the KMS encryption key, if storage is encrypted.

license_model.description: The license model for the database instance.

master_user_secret.description: Details of the master user secret, including KMS key ID, secret ARN, and status.

master_username.description: The username for the master user of the database instance.

max_allocated_storage.description: The maximum amount of storage automatically allocated for the instance.

monitoring_interval.description: The interval, in seconds, between points when Enhanced Monitoring metrics are collected for the DB instance.

monitoring_role_arn.description: The ARN for the IAM role that permits RDS to send enhanced monitoring metrics to CloudWatch Logs.

multi_az.description: Indicates if the database instance is a Multi-AZ deployment.

network_type.description: The network type used by the database instance, such as IPv4 or Dual-stack.

option_group_memberships.description: A list of option group memberships for the database instance.

port.description: The port on which the database instance listens for connections.

preferred_backup_window.description: The daily time range during which automated backups are created if automated backups are enabled.

preferred_maintenance_window.description: The weekly time range during which system maintenance can occur, in UTC.

publicly_accessible.description: Indicates whether the database instance is publicly accessible.

replicate_source_db.description: The identifier of the source DB instance if this DB instance is a read replica.

resource_id.description: The RDS Resource ID for the database instance.

storage_encrypted.description: Indicates whether the storage is encrypted for the database instance.

storage_throughput.description: The storage throughput, in MiB/s, for the database instance.

storage_type.description: The storage type associated with the database instance.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the database instance.

timezone.description: The time zone of the database instance.

vpc_security_groups.description: A list of VPC security groups associated with the database instance.
